# Solaris Prototype Milestones

Confirmed milestones:
- 2023: 24.1% efficiency single-junction baseline
- 2024 Q3: 28.4% efficiency tandem prototype (IEC-verified)
- 2025 Q1: Pilot-line equipment installed at Tsukuba facility

Scheduled:
- 2025 Q4: 30.0% efficiency target on pilot-line modules
- 2027 Q1: Commercial launch at 32% module-level efficiency
